name_en: 💐🌸CF Original Quality Imported Calfskin Ball Grain, the diamond quilting fullness reaches the same level as authentic. Very feminine and elegant. Inheriting Chane* classic 👑, it is an essential piece in every fan's wardrobe ❤️. Size:20cm
